svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(20, 126, 186), rgb(69, 160, 212));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(27, 153, 1), rgb(63, 171, 41)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(27, 153, 1), rgb(63, 171, 41));
fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 240), rgb(36, 25, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(191, 8, 22), rgb(255, 162, 174));
fill: light-dark(rgb(20, 126, 186), rgb(69, 160, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(20, 126, 186), rgb(69, 160, 212));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(191, 8, 22), rgb(255, 162, 174)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(191, 8, 22), rgb(255, 162, 174));
